title: MCP server hand-rolled on stdlib (no SDK dependency)
evidence: internal/mcp/server.go implements JSON-RPC 2.0 stdio transport (initialize, tools/list, tools/call, ping); registered via tools.go:registerTools with 7 tools
suggestion: None — requirement satisfied; noting the zero-dependency approach for cross-run comparison

title: Line coverage moderate (~59%), leaving format/error paths under-tested
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.588; 22 test functions exercise query/loader/stats and MCP handshake, but format.go renderers and tool-handler error branches (e.g. missing-filter errors in tools.go) lack direct assertions
suggestion: Add table tests for FormatMatchList/FormatStandings output and for the 'provide at least one filter' error paths

title: Optional external data sources not used
evidence: TASK.md lists API-Football/TheSportsDB/Wikipedia as optional; main.go and loader.go use only the embedded data/kaggle CSVs
suggestion: None — these sources are explicitly optional in the spec
